obsidian_shell.name: Obsidian Shell
obsidian_shell.description: A heat-buffered overlay that lets the dragon and Skye ignore unstable exhaust wash.

refractive_plate.name: Refractive Plate
refractive_plate.description: A light-bending overlay for hiding from Sub-routine Stalkers and revealing tripwires.

silicon_padded_gear.name: Silicon Padded Gear
silicon_padded_gear.description: Softcode padding that gives bad collision enough physicality to stand on.

friction_harness.name: Friction Harness
friction_harness.description: A saddle-harness overlay for steep dives and vertical pipe grip.
